content.text:
<think>
The chart shows drone strike data with bars hanging down from a timeline. The red/bright bars represent children fatalities. 

Looking at the cropped views:
- Between the "2006" and "2007" year labels, there is one dramatically tall bar that is predominantly bright red (children), extending much further down than any other bar in the entire chart
- The 2008-2012 period has many attacks but with only small red portions representing children
- The 2005 period has moderate-height red bars

The single event just after the 2006 marker represents a massive children fatality incident - this bar is by far the tallest red bar across all years.
</think>

<answer>
2006
</answer>
